change: Visible failure recovery and release-grade accessibility contracts
reliabilityChanges: Meeting metadata remains visible until audio, transcript, and semantic artifact deletion all succeed; partial and stalled deletion are terminal and retryable.
Diagnostics export has a visible busy/result state and a 60-second whole-job deadline; clipboard failure is visible; the integrity check has a 15-minute whole-job boundary.
First launch never automatically starts optional model downloads and explains the deterministic summary and full-text fallback paths.
External fonts and Vite starter CSS were removed; focus, reduced motion, forced colors, system text scaling, coarse-pointer targets, and critical ARIA semantics are explicit.

newCoverage: successful, partial-failure, and stalled meeting artifact deletion
private local launch without external fonts or starter-theme conflicts
focus, reduced-motion, forced-color, text-scaling, and coarse-pointer contracts
modal, navigation, form, progress, status, and alert semantics
no automatic optional model download on first launch

ios.knownHostGate: Xcode lists David's iPhone XIV as a possible destination, but devicectl timed out waiting for CoreDeviceService to initialize; this run proves compilation only.

android.physicalDevice: not-attempted-for-v12.26; adb unavailable in this shell

warnings: Production build reports direct eval inside onnxruntime-web, browser externalization notices in the optional Anthropic SDK, an ineffective audioStore dynamic import, and chunks larger than 500 kB.
These warnings did not fail build, lint, tests, or the rendered integrity workflow; bundle size remains a measured optimization risk.
qualificationBoundary: Build, automated, and rendered-browser proof do not prove locked physical 60/120-minute recording, native saved-audio transcription, interruption/memory-pressure behavior, destination-app receipt, largest system text, VoiceOver/TalkBack, or beta reliability rates.
